choice: Use S&P 500 total return (monthly) as the single market factor.
rationale: Human-chosen during grooming (overrode recommendation: Use a broad US total-equity-market total-return index (e.g., CRSP total market or S&P 500 total return) as the one market factor, with the longest clean monthly history we can source; betas and the bootstrap blocks are both computed/drawn from this series.)
